parameters.query:
UPDATE invoice_log
SET parsed_data = jsonb_build_object('retention_redacted', true, 'redacted_at', NOW(), 'status', status),
    source_url = CASE WHEN source_url IS NOT NULL THEN '[redacted_by_retention]' ELSE NULL END
WHERE created_at < NOW() - ('{{$json.invoiceDays}} days')::interval
  AND status IN ('completed','failed','needs_review','needs_mapping','rejected')
  AND (parsed_data IS NOT NULL AND parsed_data <> '{}'::jsonb)
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO ops_events (ts, level, workflow, event_type, message, context) VALUES (NOW(), 'info', 'data_retention_cleanup', 'retention_run', 'Retention cleanup completed', jsonb_build_object('invoice_redacted', {{$json.invoice_redacted}}, 'ops_events_deleted', {{$json.ops_events_deleted}}, 'invoice_retention_days', {{$json.invoice_retention_days}}, 'ops_retention_days', {{$json.ops_retention_days}}));
